ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_tables" (
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality data entry */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range (e.g., 0-1, 1-2) */,
  "nqx" REAL /* Probability of death between age x and x+1 */,
  "Ix" INTEGER /* Number of lives at the beginning of age x */,
  "ndx" INTEGER /* Number of deaths between age x and x+1 */,
  "nLx" REAL /* Number of person-years lived between age x and x+1 */,
  "Tx" REAL /* Total number of person-years lived by those from age x onwards */,
  "ex" REAL /* Expected remaining life in years at age x */,
  "mortality_rate_type" TEXT /* Type of mortality rate (e.g., crude, adjusted, projected) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the mortality data (e.g., government statistics, industry reports) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date range for which the mortality data is applicable */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date range for which the mortality data is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mortality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policyholders" (
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policyholder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the policyholder */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the policyholder when the policy starts */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the policyholder */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the insurance policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the insurance policy */,
  "premium_amount" REAL /* Monthly premium amount for the policy */,
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the policy_types table */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Policyholder's smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "health_conditions" TEXT /* Policyholder's pre-existing health conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policyholder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policyholders_policy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type_id") REFERENCES policy_types ("policy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance claim */,
  "policyholder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policyholder making the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., Pending, Paid, Denied) */,
  "claim_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim (e.g., death, disability) */,
  "claim_documents" TEXT /* Relevant documents for the claim (e.g., medical reports, police reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policyholder_id FOREIGN KEY ("policyholder_id") REFERENCES policyholders ("policyholder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuarial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuarial report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details contained in the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the actuary who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of actuarial report (e.g., mortality analysis, claim trends) */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Changes made to the report, including date, time, and user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actuarial_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES actuaries ("actuary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actuaries" (
  "actuary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actuary */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actuary */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the actuary */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the actuary (e.g., Fellow, Associate) */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date of certification */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Actuary's experience in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actuary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the system login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure access */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., actuary, admin, analyst) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_logins" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the action performed (e.g., report generated, data updated) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES system_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_types" (
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy type */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy type (e.g., Term Life, Whole Life) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy type */,
  "base_premium" REAL /* Base premium amount for the policy type */,
  "rider_options" TEXT /* Available rider options for the policy type */,
  "exclusions" TEXT /* Exclusions for the policy type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_riders" (
  "rider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy rider */,
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the policy_types table */,
  "rider_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy rider */,
  "rider_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy rider */,
  "additional_premium" REAL /* Additional premium amount for the policy rider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_riders_policy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type_id") REFERENCES policy_types ("policy_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_exclusions" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy exclusion */,
  "policy_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the policy_types table */,
  "exclusion_description" TEXT /* Description of the policy exclusion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_exclusions_policy_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_type_id") REFERENCES policy_types ("policy_type_id")
)
